description: Crystal Raiders Patch 3 (21 February 2024) — Adjustable Mobile Player Display Limit, Changes, Combat Balance Changes (Holy Staffs, Maces, Shapeshifter Staffs, Spears, Swords, War Gloves, Helmets, Mounts), Fixes.

sections.heading: Adjustable Mobile Player Display Limit
sections.description: Mobile users with sufficiently powerful devices can now adjust the amount of fully-rendered characters visible on-screen (previously limited to twenty). This limit is adjustable in the Settings menu.
sections.searchable_text: Mobile Player Display Limit fully-rendered characters twenty Settings menu powerful devices large-scale battles

sections.heading: Changes
items: On the final Invasion Day of a Guild Season, a territory's stored Raw Energy is now paid out the moment the territory is conquered, to prevent territory trading afterwards
sections.searchable_text: Changes final Invasion Day Guild Season territory Raw Energy paid out conquered territory trading

changes.raw_text: Wild Onslaught: The dash can now be interrupted by forced movement effects
notes: The dash can now be interrupted by forced movement effects

subsections.heading: Mounts
subsections.searchable_text: Mounts Crystal Beam Roving Bastion Cooldown 4s 6s Range 22m 18m Debuff Duration 12s 10s

changes.raw_text: Crystal Beam: Cooldown: 4s → 6s; Range: 22m → 18m; Debuff Duration: 12s → 10s

sections.heading: Fixes
items: Fixed issue where using Heroic Strike (Swords) on certain mobs (e.g. Watchers and Traps in Corrupted Dungeons) would incorrectly apply Heroic Charges
Fixed issue where incorrect quantity of Fine Spirit Paws was shown when salvaging Expert's Primal Staff
[Mobile] Fixed issue where White Tiger mount skin was not visible
[Android] Fixed issue where Twitch Drop notification would persist even after rewards claimed
[Android] Improved support for foldable phones, allowing screen changes during runtime
sections.searchable_text: Fixes Heroic Strike Swords Watchers Traps Corrupted Dungeons Heroic Charges Fine Spirit Paws Expert's Primal Staff Mobile White Tiger mount skin Android Twitch Drop notification foldable phones screen changes
